text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
School is almost over for the day. As<n>I'm passing
the dance studio, I hear...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
One, two. One, two... And now for the<n>final
pose—whoa, whoaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh. I seriously just can't get that<n>last step right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The teacher asked me to come check<n>in on you...
You're still here, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You better hurry up or else your<n>training tomorrow
is going to be<n>affected.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen, you saw it too, right?<n>How our
dance teacher was praising<n>the girl next to me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's sooo frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's the point of winning races if<n>the person
next to me onstage is<n>more eye-catching than I
am?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, school's almost over, so let's<n>go home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was told to make you go home by<n>any means
necessary.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna! There's no way you<n>can make
me! I don't care if school's<n>almost over!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Stop acting like a child. I feel<n>embarrassed for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't look at me like that! Now hurry<n>up and—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I really want to win at everything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, fine! I give up! You're so<n>stubborn, do you
know that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When I say time's up, you better<n>stop. Do you
hear me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then you dance too! ♪ It's no<n>fun if you just
stand there and watch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What makes you think I would join<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I said I would watch, but joining your<n>lesson is out
of the question!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, get ready! I'm hitting play!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey! What did I just—ugh, really<n>now?!
